supportIntro: We're here to support you. Take a moment and choose what feels right today.

coach.title: Talk to a Coach
coach.description: Connect with someone who understands what you're going through.

luna.title: Continue with Luna
luna.description: If you'd like to talk or need help finding the right support, Luna is here.

community.title: Join a Community
community.description: You’re not alone. Find supportive spaces where others share similar experiences.

resources.title: Helpful Resources
resources.description: Articles, tools, and guidance that may help you through difficult moments.

recentChat.title: Recent Conversation
recentChat.description: Continue your last chat with Luna.

upcomingSession.title: Upcoming Session
upcomingSession.description: You have a session scheduled with {{coachName}}.

savedCoaches.title: Saved Coaches
savedCoaches.description: Coaches you’ve explored or saved for later.
